title: Badger - FTC Robotics
subtitle: Completed March 2022
subheader: Badger was the FTC robot that I built for my high school team, the Great Neck North Goatbusters, during the 2021-2022 season. We won the SPBLI Qualifier, finished 5th place in qualifiers, and 3rd place for Innovate Award.

content.label: FTC Scout Info for 13375 Great Neck North Goatbusters
